subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-23
subcodes.first_line: Today I am most happy, for I see here a gathering of the servants of God... ...In the estimation of God there is no distinction of color; all are one in the color
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز من در نهایت سرورم زیرا می بینم بندگان الهی در این مجمع حاضرند سفید و سیاه
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @unity in diversity, @love and unity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
